title: Opendoor’s India exit is fueling a bigger conversation about AI and outsourcing
summary: Opendoor's exit from India highlights growing concerns about AI and outsourcing as India establishes itself as the world's largest Global Capability Center market. The move reflects shifting dynamics in how companies approach offshore operations amid AI advancement.
content: The decision comes as India emerges as the world’s largest GCC market.

zh.title: Opendoor 退出印度引发关于人工智能和外包的更大讨论
zh.summary: Opendoor 退出印度突显了人们对人工智能和外包的日益关注,同时印度确立了自己作为全球最大全球能力中心市场的地位。这一举措反映了在人工智能发展的背景下,公司对离岸运营方式的动态转变。

title: Anthropic’s Dario Amodei has just one direct report
summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei maintains an unusually lean management structure with just one direct report. The leadership approach suggests a highly focused organizational model at the AI research company.
content: If you doubted his genius, doubt no more.

zh.title: Anthropic 首席执行官达里奥·阿莫代只有一名直属下属
zh.summary: Anthropic 首席执行官达里奥·阿莫代维持着异常精简的管理结构,只有一名直属下属。这种领导方式表明了这家人工智能研究公司高度专注的组织模式。

title: Bluesky is getting ‘communities’
summary: Bluesky will launch "communities" this year as smaller, decentralized spaces built on the AT Protocol where users can engage with like-minded people. The feature will allow users to create, join, post, and receive updates, expanding organizational capabilities while maintaining simplicity.
content:
Bluesky will be getting "communities," which will function as smaller spaces where you can "go deeper and hang out with people who care about the same stuff" sometime this year, according to head of product Alex Benzer. They will be built on the decentralized AT Protocol that underpins Bluesky, with Benzer saying that "it's a new structure for everyone" that's part of the "Atmosphere" (a shorthand for the AT Protocol ecosystem).
Benzer listed out a "few ideas we have in mind so far" in a thread. "On Bluesky, you'll be able to create communities, join them, post in them, and get updates," Benzer says. "The core features on Bluesky stay simpl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Bluesky 推出"社区"功能
zh.summary: Bluesky 将在今年推出"社区"功能，这是基于 AT Protocol 构建的小型去中心化空间，用户可以在其中与志同道合的人互动。该功能允许用户创建、加入、发布和接收更新，在扩展组织能力的同时保持简洁性。
